name: Digital Analytics Scorecard
description: Executive KPI scorecard for Tales & Timber digital commerce and marketing performance. Tracks website conversion, cart abandonment, engagement metrics, mobile adoption, and email marketing ROI.

goals.name: Website Conversion Rate
goals.description: Percentage of website sessions that result in a completed purchase (all devices)
goals.notes: Desktop conversion at 3.8%, mobile at 2.1%, tablet at 3.0%. Checkout UX redesign in Q3 targeting +0.4pp lift.

goals.name: Cart Abandonment Rate
goals.description: Percentage of shopping carts created that are not converted to completed orders
goals.notes: Lower is better. Top abandonment reasons: unexpected shipping costs (35%), account creation required (25%), slow checkout (18%). Industry average is 70%.

goals.name: Average Session Duration
goals.description: Mean time spent per website/app session across all digital properties
goals.notes: Engaged sessions (2+ page views) average 6.8 min. Bounce sessions pull average down. Product detail pages have highest dwell time.

goals.name: Mobile Traffic Share
goals.description: Percentage of total website sessions originating from mobile devices (phone + tablet)
goals.notes: Phone: 48%, tablet: 9%, desktop: 43%. Mobile app users have 2.3x higher LTV than mobile web. App install campaign running in Q3.

goals.name: Email Campaign ROI
goals.description: Return on investment for email marketing campaigns (revenue attributed / campaign cost)
goals.notes: ROI = attributed revenue / (platform cost + creative cost + list management). Personalized campaigns at 5.2x vs. batch sends at 2.8x. 2.1M active subscribers.
